name: Thumbnail
description: Renders a bounded single-format thumbnail via image-extractor. Covers image-extractor's supported formats that file-type detects a real image/* MIME signature for — confirmed empirically for jpeg/png/webp/avif/tiff/gif via real sharp-encoded fixtures; heic/heif/psd are not independently verified in this environment (no real sample bytes available) but rely on their IANA-registered image/* MIME types, which file-type is built to recognise. See thumbnail-svg/renderer.json for the one exception in this extractor's own list: SVG isn't in this manifest's file_type array at all — it's real, meaningful text content as well as a rasterizable image, so it always lands as fileMode 'text' (isTextual is content-sniff-only, not MIME-dependent), which this manifest's own file_mode "binary" would exclude entirely regardless of what array it were added to. thumbnail-svg handles it via file_mode "any" instead, pairing with Raw text rather than Raw binary.
